description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script to install Docker with bash ci/docker_install.sh > /dev/null. Define three jobs in the default test stage: a "coding style" job using the php:7.0 image that executes vendor/bin/phpcs; a "unit tests:php7.0" job also using php:7.0 that runs vendor/bin/kahlan --coverage; and a "unit tests:php7.1" job using php:7.1 that runs vendor/bin/kahlan --coverage. No caches, artifacts, services, variables, or special rules are configured. The pipeline should simply execute these linting and coverage commands for each PHP version.
